digest.title: New York becomes the first state to impose a data center moratorium
Why Performance per Watt Is the Ultimate Metric for AI Infrastructure Efficiency
digest.tldr: Power is AI infrastructure’s inescapable constraint.  How many tokens an AI factory can generate within a fixed power budget determines its revenue and profitability.

digest.title: How sales teams use ChatGPT Work
digest.tldr: See how sales teams can use ChatGPT Work to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.

digest.title: The Google Images homepage will recommend photos even before you search
digest.tldr: Google is announcing a big change to the Google Images homepage in honor of the platform's 25th anniversary this week.  Instead of a mostly blank page with a search bar, the homepage will soon show you a bunch of images…
